task_completion.description: The draw.io application is open and the 'Fluid Power' shape library is used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io window is visible. In the left panel, the 'Fluid Power' shape library is expanded or visible, containing ISO 1219 standard hydraulic symbols.

task_completion.description: All required hydraulic components are placed on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas contains symbols for a Reservoir (Tank), Fixed Displacement Pump, Electric Motor, Pressure Relief Valve, 4-Way 3-Position Directional Control Valve, Double-Acting Cylinder, and Return Line Filter.

task_completion.description: The pressure side of the circuit is correctly connected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines connect the Pump to the Directional Control Valve. Another line connects the Pressure Relief Valve bridging the main pressure line to the Tank/Reservoir.

task_completion.description: The actuator and return side of the circuit are correctly connected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines connect the Directional Control Valve to both ends of the Double-Acting Cylinder. The exhaust/return port of the Valve connects to the Return Line Filter, which then connects to the Tank/Reservoir.

task_completion.description: Main components in the diagram are labeled with text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels are present next to or on the components, including terms like 'Pump', 'Lift Cylinder', 'Relief Valve', 'Filter', 'Tank' (or 'Reservoir'), and 'Motor'.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as a .drawio file and exported as a .png file to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Desktop or a file manager window shows the files 'forklift_hydraulic.drawio' and 'forklift_hydraulic.png'. Alternatively, save/export dialogs confirm these file names and locations.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the draw.io canvas, dragging and dropping shapes, and drawing connection lines, rather than using a terminal or text editor to write XML.

integrity.description: The PNG file was exported using draw.io's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Export as' dialog in draw.io or the file being saved as a PNG from within the application.

integrity.description: The agent did not download a pre-made hydraulic circuit image from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser is not used to search for and download a finished hydraulic circuit diagram. The diagram is built manually in draw.io.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using draw.io (version 26.0.9) with the 'Fluid Power' shape library (ISO 1219 standard). Required components: Electric Motor, Fixed Displacement Pump, Hydraulic Reservoir (Tank), Pressure Relief Valve, 4/3 Directional Control Valve, Double-Acting Cylinder, and Return Line Filter. Labels must include terms like 'pump', 'cylinder', 'valve', 'filter', 'tank'/'reservoir', and 'motor'. The final outputs must be saved as 'forklift_hydraulic.drawio' and 'forklift_hydraulic.png' on the Desktop.
